# cantonjs

TypeScript interface for the Canton Network — viem for Canton.

## Installation

npm install cantonjs

## Usage

import { createLedgerClient, jsonApi } from 'cantonjs'

const client = createLedgerClient({
  transport: jsonApi({ url: 'http://localhost:7575', token: 'your-jwt' }),
  actAs: 'Alice::1234',
})

// Create a contract
const created = await client.createContract('pkg:Module:Template', { owner: 'Alice', value: 100 })

// Exercise a choice
const tx = await client.exerciseChoice('pkg:Module:Template', created.contractId, 'Transfer', { newOwner: 'Bob' })

// Query active contracts
const contracts = await client.queryContracts('pkg:Module:Template')

// Stream updates (AsyncIterator pattern)
const stream = streamUpdates(transport, { beginExclusive: '0', signal: controller.signal })
for await (const update of stream) {
  // process update — auto-reconnects on disconnect
}

## Subpath Imports

import { createLedgerClient } from 'cantonjs/ledger'
import { createAdminClient } from 'cantonjs/admin'
import { createTestClient } from 'cantonjs/testing'
import { localNet, devNet, testNet, mainNet } from 'cantonjs/chains'
import type { TemplateDescriptor, InferPayload } from 'cantonjs/codegen'

## Client Types

LedgerClient — party-scoped contract operations (create, exercise, query, stream)
  - createContract(templateId, args, options?) -> CreatedEvent
  - exerciseChoice(templateId, contractId, choice, args, options?) -> JsTransaction
  - queryContracts(templateId, options?) -> ActiveContract[]
  - getTransactionById(updateId) / getTransactionByOffset(offset) -> JsTransaction
  - getEventsByContractId(contractId) -> TaggedEvent[]
  - getLedgerEnd() -> string
  - getConnectedSynchronizers() -> ConnectedSynchronizer[]
  - submitReassignment(command, options?) -> Reassignment
  - prepareSubmission(templateId, args, options?) -> PrepareSubmissionResponse
  - executeSubmission(preparedTx, signatures, options?) -> JsTransaction

AdminClient — node administration
  - allocateParty, listParties, getParty, updateParty
  - createUser, getUser, listUsers, deleteUser, grantRights, revokeRights
  - uploadDar, listPackages, getPackage, validateDar
  - getVettedPackages, updateVettedPackages
  - createIdentityProvider, listIdentityProviders, updateIdentityProvider, deleteIdentityProvider
  - getLedgerApiVersion
  - Pagination via PaginatedResult<T> with page_size/page_token

TestClient — extends LedgerClient + AdminClient
  - getTime, setTime, advanceTime
  - allocateParties(['Alice', 'Bob'])
  - setupCantonSandbox() vitest fixture

## Transports

jsonApi({ url, token, timeout?, headers? }) — HTTP transport for Canton JSON API V2
grpc({ grpcTransport, token }) — gRPC via injected ConnectRPC client
fallback({ transports, retries? }) — failover, retries on ConnectionError/TimeoutError

## Codegen

cantonjs-codegen — separate CLI package for generating TypeScript types from Daml DAR files

cantonjs-codegen --dar ./model.dar --output ./src/generated

Generates:
- Record types -> TypeScript type aliases with readonly fields
- Variant types -> discriminated unions ({ tag: 'Name'; value: T })
- Enum types -> string union types ('A' | 'B' | 'C')
- Templates -> companion const objects with templateId and choices
- Choice argument types -> type aliases

Type mapping: Int64/Numeric -> string (precision), Party/ContractId -> string,
Optional -> T | null, List -> readonly T[], Date/Time -> string (ISO 8601)

## React Hooks (cantonjs-react)

npm install cantonjs-react @tanstack/react-query

CantonProvider — wraps QueryClientProvider + Canton context
  <CantonProvider client={ledgerClient} queryClient={optionalQueryClient}>

useContracts({ templateId, enabled?, refetchInterval? }) — TanStack Query wrapper
useCreateContract({ templateId, onSuccess? }) — mutation with cache invalidation
useExercise({ templateId, choice, onSuccess? }) — mutation with cache invalidation
useStreamContracts({ templateId, enabled? }) — polling-based live updates (5s interval)
useCantonClient() — access LedgerClient from context
useParty() — current actAs party

Query key pattern: ['canton', 'contracts', templateId, actAs]
Mutations invalidate ['canton', 'contracts', templateId] on success

## Streaming

WebSocket-based streaming with AsyncIterator pattern:
- streamUpdates() — transaction update stream with auto-reconnect
- streamContracts() — active contract stream (bounded, no reconnect)
- streamCompletions() — command completion stream
- Auto-reconnect: exponential backoff (1s initial, 30s max, 2x factor, +/-25% jitter)
- Offset-based resumption for gap-free reconnection
- AbortSignal cancellation support

## Testing Utilities

- createMockTransport() — mock with response sequences, error injection, assertion helpers
- createRecordingTransport() — records all requests for replay
- setupCantonSandbox() — vitest fixture with cantonctl integration (start, health, JWT, cleanup)
- No vi.mock() — all dependencies injected through function parameters

## Error Handling

All errors extend CantonjsError with: code, metaMessages (recovery hints), docsPath, walk()

Error classes: ConnectionError, HttpError, GrpcError, TimeoutError,
  TokenExpiredError, InvalidTokenError,
  CommandRejectedError, ContractNotFoundError, AuthorizationError,
  WebSocketError, StreamClosedError, ReconnectFailedError

Error code ranges:
CJ1xxx — Transport (connection, HTTP, gRPC)
CJ2xxx — Authentication (JWT)
CJ3xxx — Ledger (command rejection, authorization)
CJ4xxx — Admin (party, user, package)
CJ5xxx — Streaming (WebSocket, reconnection)
CJ6xxx — Codegen (type mismatch, generation)

## Canton Key Concepts

Party — identity unit (not address), permissions via JWT token
Template — Daml contract definition, identified by packageId:moduleName:entityName
Choice — operation on a contract (like calling a function)
ContractId — unique UTXO-style identifier
DAR — Daml Archive deployment artifact
Synchronizer — consensus domain for transaction ordering

## Canton Ledger API V2

JSON API endpoints under /v2/:
  /v2/commands/submit-and-wait — synchronous command submission
  /v2/commands/submit-and-wait-for-transaction — returns transaction
  /v2/commands/submit-and-wait-for-reassignment — reassignment
  /v2/state/active-contracts — query active contracts (streaming)
  /v2/updates — transaction update stream
  /v2/commands/completions — command completion stream
  /v2/parties — party management
  /v2/users — user management
  /v2/packages — package queries
  /v2/dars — DAR upload
  /v2/identity-provider-configs — IDP management
  /v2/package-vetting — package vetting
  /v2/state/connected-synchronizers — synchronizer queries
  /v2/state/latest-pruned-offsets — pruning state
  /v2/version — API version
  /v2/interactive-submission/prepare — external signing preparation
  /v2/interactive-submission/execute — execute signed submission
  /livez — health check (unauthenticated)

## Architecture

- Function exports, not classes (tree-shakeable)
- Dependency injection via Transport interface (no direct fetch)
- ESM-first with CJS fallback, sideEffects: false
- Structured errors: CantonjsError with code, metaMessages, docsPath, walk()
- AbortSignal support for long-running operations
- Zero runtime dependencies — transports are injected
- Bundle size: core 5.08 KB, ledger subpath 1.1 KB (minified + brotli)
- 237 tests across 3 packages (192 core + 29 codegen + 16 React)

## Links

Repository: https://github.com/merged-one/cantonjs
Companion CLI: https://github.com/merged-one/cantonctl
Canton Network: https://www.canton.network
Canton Docs: https://docs.digitalasset.com
